issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The skill assumes Node.js, Bun, or Deno environments, limiting cross-platform applicability.
curl|bash from official source in setup, missing checksums.

scenarios.name: embedded-replica-setup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses syncUrl, syncInterval, and db.sync() per skill; baseline omits embedded replica primitives and treats Turso as a remote-only client.

scenarios.name: atomic-transfer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses db.transaction("write") with tx.commit()/tx.rollback() per skill; baseline falls back to raw BEGIN/COMMIT SQL and misses the interactive transaction API.
